feed.title: Shashi Kanth G S | Writing
feed.subtitle: Architecture and engineering writing on airline systems modernization, platform design, and AI-assisted operations.

entry.title: Build a Vendor-Neutral A2A Agent That Works With Any LLM Provider
entry.summary: A practical guide to exposing OpenCode behind A2A so orchestration logic stays stable even when the underlying model provider changes.

entry.title: Turn GitHub Copilot into an A2A-Compliant Agent in Under 5 Minutes
entry.summary: A concise walkthrough showing how to expose GitHub Copilot as a discoverable A2A agent with MCP tool access and minimal setup.

entry.title: The Two Rails of Modern AI: How MCP and A2A Power the Next Generation of Agent Systems
entry.summary: A protocol-first view of modern agent systems: MCP as the tool rail, A2A as the agent rail, and why the combination matters for composable AI architecture.

entry.title: The Missing Piece for AI-Assisted Infrastructure Management
entry.summary: A practical argument for secure, auditable AI-assisted operations, built around SSH MCP Bridge and real-world homelab and infrastructure workflows.
